rationale.fidelity: Fully preserves mandatory review, signal-contingent binary approval, latent safety, and the expected approved-utility minus unsafe-harm objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Actor, trigger, actions, stakes, mechanism, trade-off, counterfactual, and excluded actions are all explicit and operational.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: The response neither needs nor attempts scholarly positioning.
rationale.evidence_discipline: It labels signal informativeness as an assumption, rejects unsupported rewriting and review-choice claims, and states deployment validation needs.
rationale.prose_clarity: Accurate and readable, but the same content is repeated across many template sections.
rationale.overall: Substantively excellent and free of model changes, with an economy penalty only.
